title: Hyperreal Diorama Cube · 地质剖面立方
visual_notes: 6 层地质全渲染:Topsoil / Clay / Sandstone / Limestone / Basalt / Magma Core · 6 个英文标签全部精确拼写 · 玻璃立方体透明感 + 边缘反光 + 熔岩发光都到位 · 博物馆展品级。扣 0.5 分:topsoil 根须略有菜根感。

shots.prompt:
Aspect ratio 1:1 square.

Scene:
A hyperreal transparent glass cube displayed like a premium natural history museum specimen, floating in front of a deep charcoal-black background. The cube is shown from a diagonal three-quarter cutaway angle, with the top plane, front plane, and right plane all visible. A focused overhead museum spotlight falls from above, creating thin silver rim highlights along every glass edge and subtle caustic reflections on the cube faces.

Subject:
Inside the glass cube is a precise miniature geological cross-section with six stacked strata from top to bottom: loose topsoil, compressed clay, banded sandstone, porous limestone, black crystalline basalt, and a glowing magma core. The cube is transparent enough to see the full internal stratigraphy, while the glass still has realistic thickness, bevels, refraction, and polished museum-object reflections.

Important details:
Make every layer materially distinct and tactile: granular dark-brown soil particles with tiny roots in the topsoil; smooth reddish clay laminae; ochre sandstone with horizontal sediment stripes; pale limestone full of small rounded holes and fossil-like pores; dense black basalt with angular crystal lattice facets; molten red-orange magma with incandescent cracks and heat glow at the bottom. Keep the layers cleanly separated, readable, and textbook-accurate, with a refined editorial craft aesthetic.

Screens and text:
Render six crisp small museum callout labels in white technical lettering, each inside a thin translucent label tab on the front-right side of the cube, connected by hairline leader marks to the correct stratum. The exact quoted text must appear once and only once: "Topsoil", "Clay", "Sandstone", "Limestone", "Basalt", "Magma Core". Keep spelling exact, straight, sharp, and legible.

Use case:
High-end geology textbook cover image, museum exhibition catalog plate, editorial scientific diorama artwork.

Constraints:
Photoreal, macro product photography quality, high dynamic range, no decorative border, no watermark, no extra labels beyond the six quoted layer names. Aspect ratio 1:1 square.
